---
title: "Part 6：生成模型"
author: jshn9515
date: 2026-05-05
date-modified: today
page-layout: full
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - "../ch12-generative-adversarial-networks/*.qmd"
    - "../ch13-autoencoders-and-vaes/*.qmd"
    - "../ch14-diffusion-models/*.qmd"
  sort: title asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: part6-generative-models
  description: "Part 6: Generative Models"
---
